## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are limited to the scope described above
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or personal data introduced
- [ ] If figures changed: `make figures` runs without error and outputs match committed PDFs
- [ ] If paper source changed: `make paper` compiles without warnings on a clean checkout
- [ ] If code changed: `pytest` passes and coverage ≥ 90% on `code/cm/`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
